facebook.content:
My dear brothers and sisters in Christ,

I want to remind you that your identity is not defined by your circumstances. You are not what you're going through, you are a child of the Most High God, adopted into the family of God.

Don't lose sight of who you are. You are not weak, you are strong in His strength. You are not broken, you are whole in His presence. You are not a victim, you are a victor in His kingdom.

Remember who you are and walk in that identity.
facebook.cta:
Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html

instagram.content: You are not defined by your past. You are not limited by your present circumstances. You are a child of the King, and your future is already secure in Him. He is your refuge, your strength, and your deliverer. Rise up, son/daughter, and walk in the freedom that is yours. You are a masterpiece, crafted by the Almighty.

tiktok.content: "Son or daughter, when the road ahead seems uncertain, remember this: the Lord goes before you, not just behind. He is the way, the truth, and the life. Fix your eyes on Him, not the obstacles. Walk by faith, not sight. Declare with me: 'I will follow Him, no matter what.'"
tiktok.cta: Learn more about our mission → Link in bio
